creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rm
Date: Tue Jun 11 18:25:17 2013
New Revision: 320621
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/320621

Log:
  ECDSA cryptographic signature library (pure python).
  
  WWW: http://github.com/warner/python-ecdsa
  
  PR:		179448
  Submitted by:	Neil Booth Neil Booth <kyuupichan@gmail.com>

Added:
  head/security/py-ecdsa/
  head/security/py-ecdsa/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/security/py-ecdsa/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/security/py-ecdsa/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/security/py-ecdsa/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/security/Makefile

Modified: head/security/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/security/Makefile	Tue Jun 11 18:24:08 2013	(r320620)
+++ head/security/Makefile	Tue Jun 11 18:25:17 2013	(r320621)
@@ -741,6 +741,7 @@
     SUBDIR += py-crack
     SUBDIR += py-cracklib
     SUBDIR += py-cryptkit
+    SUBDIR += py-ecdsa
     SUBDIR += py-fail2ban
     SUBDIR += py-gnupg
     SUBDIR += py-gnutls

Added: head/security/py-ecdsa/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/security/py-ecdsa/Makefile	Tue Jun 11 18:25:17 2013	(r320621)
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+# Created by: Neil Booth
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	ecdsa
+PORTVERSION=	0.8
+CATEGORIES=	security python
+MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
+
+MAINTAINER=	kyuupichan@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	ECDSA cryptographic signature library (pure python)
+
+LICENSE=	MIT
+
+USE_PYTHON=	-2.7
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
+
+regression-test: build
+	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${PYTHON_CMD} ${PYSETUP} test
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/security/py-ecdsa/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/security/py-ecdsa/distinfo	Tue Jun 11 18:25:17 2013	(r320621)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (ecdsa-0.8.tar.gz) = 926dbc7f31f5e099079884e1ae8121d25c43b17f1db48d77c9540cd1e40acc1a
+SIZE (ecdsa-0.8.tar.gz) = 35754

Added: head/security/py-ecdsa/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/security/py-ecdsa/pkg-descr	Tue Jun 11 18:25:17 2013	(r320621)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+ECDSA cryptographic signature library (pure python).
+
+WWW: http://github.com/warner/python-ecdsa

Added: head/security/py-ecdsa/pkg-plist
==============================================================================

+++ head/security/py-ecdsa/pkg-plist	Tue Jun 11 18:25:17 2013	(r320621)
@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/ecdsa/__init__.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/ecdsa/__init__.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/ecdsa/__init__.pyo

+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/ecdsa/_version.pyo

+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/ecdsa/numbertheory.pyo
